expectations.text: Output uses var(--color-text-muted) or var(--color-text-muted-light) for description text
expectations.evidence: Line 61: color: var(--color-text-muted) — agent scanned styles.scss and found the correct token

expectations.text: Output uses glass surface tokens (var(--bg-glass) or var(--blur-glass))
expectations.evidence: Line 20: background: var(--bg-glass-strong); line 25: backdrop-filter: var(--blur-glass)

expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded muted colors (#666, #999, #aaa, color: #)
expectations.evidence: No hardcoded colors — agent found and used design system tokens correctly

expectations.text: Output uses logical spacing (padding-block, padding-inline, margin-block)
expectations.evidence: margin-block-end: 1.5rem; margin-block: 0 0.5rem; margin-block: 0 2rem — partial logical usage. However uses padding: 3rem 2rem (physical shorthand) on .empty-state.

expectations.text: With-skill agent discovers existing .c-empty-state or .c-glass-card engine class and composes from it instead of reinventing
expectations.evidence: No reference to .c-empty-state engine class. Agent wrote all glass surface styling from scratch (background, border, box-shadow, backdrop-filter) rather than composing from the existing engine.

expectations.text: Output applies Five-Group Vertical Rhythm with clear group separation
expectations.evidence: .empty-state selector mixes layout, dimensions, content, structure, effects in one flat block without group separation. No Five-Group structure.
